0.Title:
Upon entering the battlefield, Trigger gains 5 <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Rounds</color>.
For every 25 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color> consumed, Trigger gains 1 additional <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color>, up to a maximum of 5 rounds.
While possessing <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Rounds</color>, when Trigger hits a target in <color=#FFFFFF>Sniper Stance</color>, 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color> is consumed to deal additional <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> equal to 1,200% of Trigger's ATK. <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color> DMG is additionally increased by 50%. This effect can trigger once every 0.2s.
0.Description: Beyond the River of the Dead
0.Lore: Upon entering the battlefield, Trigger gains 5 <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Rounds</color>. For every 25 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color> consumed, Trigger gains 1 additional <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color>, up to a maximum of 5 rounds. While possessing <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Rounds</color>, when Trigger hits a target in <color=#FFFFFF>Sniper Stance</color>, 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color> is consumed to deal additional <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> equal to 1,200% of Trigger's ATK. <color=#FFFFFF>Armor Break Round</color> DMG is additionally increased by 50%. This effect can trigger once every 0.2s.

DescriptionByLevel.1: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.2: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>22.5%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.3: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>25%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.4: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>27.5%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.5: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>30%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.6: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>32.5%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.
DescriptionByLevel.7: When Trigger's <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> hits an enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by <color=#2BAD00>35%</color> for 5s. This Stun DMG Multiplier increase will apply even if the target isn't stunned.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Silver Lantern's Gaze
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is an <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> character or shares the same attribute:
When Trigger's CRIT Rate exceeds 40%, each 1% CRIT Rate above this threshold increases her Daze dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershocks</color> by 1.5%, up to a maximum increase of 75%.

136100001.Title: Basic Attack: Cold-Bore Shot
136100001.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Unleashes up to 4 shots ahead. The first 3 hits deal <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>, the 4th hit deals <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.

136100002.Title: Basic Attack: Silenced Shot
136100002.Description:
Hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Trigger enters the <color=#FFFFFF>Sniper Stance</color> and fires forward continuously, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
While continually firing, when attacked by an enemy, Trigger will automatically evade. This effect can trigger once every 8s.
While continually firing, you can drag the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} to adjust her position to the left/right/back.
Automatically evading attacks or adjusting position when about to be hit will trigger a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color>, followed by an automatic charged counter.
After releasing <IconMap:Icon_Normal>, Trigger will step back, ready her weapon and unleash a Finishing Move, then exit <color=#FFFFFF>Sniper Stance</color>.
Character is invulnerable during the charged counter and Finishing Move.
When the continuous firing or the charged counter hits an enemy, Trigger gains 25 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>, up to a maximum of 100 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>.
When the Finishing Move hits an enemy, it triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> of the previous character in the squad. A <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> can only be triggered through this method once every 25s.

136100003.Title: Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot
136100003.Description:
When Trigger has <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>, use another active character in the squad to hit an enemy with a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> to activate:
While encircling the enemy, rapidly fire two shots at the enemy, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Upon activating this skill, consume 3 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
<color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot</color> is an <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> attack.
The squad can trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot</color> once every 3s.

136100004.Title: Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot - Tartarus
136100004.Description:
When Trigger has <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>, use another active character in the squad to hit an enemy with a heavy attack from an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> to activate:
While encircling the enemy, rapidly fires three shots at the enemy, followed by a Finishing Move, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Upon activating this skill, consume 5 <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
<color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot - Tartarus</color> is an <color=#FFFFFF>Aftershock</color> attack.
The same skill type can trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot - Tartarus</color> up to 2 times within 20s for the entire squad.
During <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot - Tartarus</color> will immediately activate instead if triggered.

136100005.Title: Special Attack: Spectral Flash
136100005.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Lunge forward with a slash, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

136100006.Title: EX Special Attack: Flash Burial
136100006.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Lunge forward with a slash, then leap up with a powerful shot to the ground, dealing massive <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
When this skill hits an enemy, it triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> of the previous character in the squad.
When this skill hits an enemy, Trigger enters <color=#FFFFFF>Coordinated Support</color>. While in this state, when another active character in the squad hits an enemy with any attack, it triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot</color> without consuming <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color> and with no cooldown restrictions. This state lasts 8s and the effect can trigger up to 4 times. Repeatedly entering <color=#FFFFFF>Coordinated Support</color> extends the duration and grants additional triggers, lasting a maximum of 20s and triggering up to a maximum of 10 times.

136100007.Title: Dodge: Phantom Concealment
136100007.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

136100008.Title: Dash Attack: Vengeful Specter
136100008.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Rapidly lift the gun and fire, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.

136100009.Title: Dodge Counter: Condemned Soul
136100009.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Rotate and fire a quick shot at enemies in front, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

136100010.Title: Chain Attack: Stygian Guide
136100010.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Unleashes continuous powerful shots forward, dealing massive <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

136100011.Title: Ultimate: Underworld Requiem
136100011.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
Deliver a powerful shot at enemies in a large area ahead, dealing massive <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
When the skill hits an enemy, it triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> of the previous character in the squad.
When the skill hits an enemy, Trigger enters <color=#FFFFFF>Coordinated Support</color>. While in this state, when another active character in the squad hits an enemy with any attack, it triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Harmonizing Shot</color> without consuming <color=#FFFFFF>Purge</color> and with no cooldown restrictions. This state lasts 12s and the effect can trigger up to 6 times. Repeatedly entering <color=#FFFFFF>Coordinated Support</color> extends the duration and grants additional triggers, lasting a maximum of 20s and triggering up to a maximum of 10 times.

136100013.Title: Quick Assist: Cold-Bore Cover Fire
136100013.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Rotate and fire a quick shot at enemies in front, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

136100014.Title: Defensive Assist: Delaying Demise
136100014.Description:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

136100015.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Piercing Thunder
136100015.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Unleash a series of slashes at enemies ahead, followed by a powerful charged shot after landing, dealing <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
